title: Quadlet - add StopTimeout key for .container file
body:
Allow setting the timeout for stopping the container Add test
Update man

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?
Yes

```release-note
Quadlet - add StopTimeout key for .container file
```

Resolves: #21134
